text:
(4) The meeting of all the debenture holders shall be convened by the debenture trustee on—
(a) requisition in writing signed by debenture holders holding at least one-tenth in value
of the debentures for the time being outstanding;
(b) the happening of any event, which constitutes a breach, default or which in the opinion
of the debenture trustees affects the interest of the debenture holders.
